pi_items.source: Task description and verifier.py explicitly require this name.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require this short name.
Task description, setup_task.sh, and verifier.py explicitly require the parent to be Bo.
setup_task.sh forces these facilities to have Tikonko as parent, and verifier.py strictly checks that both are moved to the new unit.
Task description and verifier.py explicitly require this date.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the synthetic DHIS2 Sierra Leone demo database, which is initialized via dhis2-db-sierra-leone.sql.gz. The setup scripts artificially manipulate the database state to ensure 'Gondama MCHP' and 'Tikonko CHC' are assigned to 'Tikonko' before the task starts. I have explicitly verified that all metadata claims (target unit name 'Tikonko North', short name 'Tikonko N', parent 'Bo', expected opening date '2023-01-01', and the exact facilities to move) exactly match the requirements detailed in the task description instructions and the scoring constraints within verifier.py.
